pi_items.source: Task description clearly instructs the agent to create a component named 'Security Audit Module'. Verified that it does not pre-exist in the data.
Task description specifies the new requirement text must contain 'timestamped audit log entry'. Verified that it does not pre-exist in the data.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh and task_utils.sh shows the project directory is created as /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/trace_feature_project.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Example Project in ReqView. The agent must create a new component named 'Security Audit Module' in the ARCH document and a new requirement containing the text 'timestamped audit log entry' in the SRS document, then link them. The target project directory for the task is 'trace_feature_project'.
